mnemonics.title: Use Case Approach
mnemonics.content: Identify, Analyze, Document, Refine, and Test

mnemonics.title: Use Case Scenario
mnemonics.content: Sequence of Events, Pre-conditions, and Post-conditions

acronyms.usage: A graphical representation of the use cases and actors in a system.
A description of the sequence of events that occurs during a use case.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a diagram with actors and use cases connected by lines, representing the relationships between them.
Picture a sequence of events, like a flowchart, showing the interactions between the actor and the system.

analogies.analogy: Writing a recipe for your favorite dish. You need to identify the ingredients, analyze the cooking process, document the steps, refine the recipe, and test it to ensure it's perfect.
Creating a map of a city. You need to identify the key locations (actors), the roads (use cases), and the connections between them (relationships).
